title: Room Activation Packet
description: Pre-spawn invocation envelope for a Loa construct room (FR-4.6). Persisted at .run/rooms/<room_id>.json. room_id is content-addressable (SHA-256 of JCS-canonical packet body without room_id field).

room_id.description: Content-addressable id (sha256 of JCS-canonical packet body without room_id).

persona.description: Optional persona pin. If null, adapter default applies.

mode.description: Default 'room'. Studio means natural-language synthesis allowed for this invocation.

invocation_path.description: Tracks how the room is being activated. Sprint 0 finding: 'agent_call' does not work for project agents — use 'at_mention' or 'room_packet' (which itself surfaces via @-mention).

inputs.description: Echoes prior stage's output_refs when chained.

expected_handoff_path.description: Where the produced handoff packet should be written. Null for default convention.

forbidden_context.description: Paths/refs the construct MUST NOT load. Behavioral enforcement this cycle; runtime enforcement deferred to future cycle (acknowledged limitation).

allowed_skills.description: Subset of construct's declared skills that this room may invoke. Empty array means all declared skills allowed.

created_by.description: Operator handle, composition runner id, or other producing entity.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Defaults to 1.0 if absent.
